authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife
U.S. Geological Survey (Geographic Names Information System)

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(169) — Yellow Creek (Plumas Co.)
sources.quotedText: (169) Yellow Creek (Plumas Co.) from Big Springs downstream to the marker at the lower end of Humbug Meadow. Sat. preceding Memorial Day through the last day in Feb. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout

sources.title: DIY Guide to Fly Fishing Yellow Creek in California
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 269340, "Yellow Creek", Stream, CA, Plumas Co.
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":269340,"gaz_name":"Yellow Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Plumas"} — geometry multipoint; first point converts to lon -121.2508, lat 40.0066, at the creek's mouth on the North Fork Feather River near Belden, corroborated independently by HomeTownLocator's GNIS-sourced waypoint for the same feature (fid 269340: 40.0065527, -121.2507983). Corrects the file's prior coordinate (-121.2700, 40.1300), which sat ~14km upstream near the Humbug Valley/Big Springs reach and was not GNIS-derived.

parameters.note: Season crosses the calendar year boundary, running from late May through the end of February the following year; closed only in March, April, and early-to-mid May.

regulations.humanSummary: Open from the Saturday preceding Memorial Day through the last day of February
regulations.verbatimText: Sat. preceding Memorial Day through the last day in Feb.

parameters.note: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: Zero trout may be retained; all trout caught must be released unharmed.

regulations.humanSummary: Zero trout bag limit — catch and release only

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
